name: Exelon Corporation
description: Exelon Corporation is a leading U.S. energy transmission and distribution company, serving more than 10 million customers through its six fully regulated utilities: Atlantic City Electric, BGE, ComEd, Delmarva Power, PECO, and Pepco. Headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, Exelon is dedicated to providing safe, reliable, and clean energy delivery while driving the transition to a clean energy future through grid modernization and sustainable infrastructure investments.
